items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Arrival Drawstring Dustbag "Garbage Bag" really easy to match! A lazy, free-spirited vibe 💥 With a classic woven design, creating a timeless fashion staple 🔥 The drawstring closure creates a natural opening with a crumpled look and soft, smooth calfskin. Every detail reveals this bag's lazy yet exquisite feel~🤏 Not only lightweight but also spacious. If you want a bag with a relaxed vibe, get this "garbage bag" that brings you joy ✨ Model 3005
Size: 32x23

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Arrival ❤️ Woven Small Square Bag
Most existing styles are a bit trendy
and a bit hard to style
So I picked this one!
This small square bag is similar to the Cloud Bag in small size
But! It is lighter than the Cloud Bag and has much more capacity
This is a little cutie that crosses all age groups
I like it, Mom likes it, and even Grandma will like it!
And the large woven pattern won't look old-fashioned~
As someone who is half a fashionista, I think
this is a very excellent small bag!
Specially bought a ZP to develop
Model 3001S Size 22*15*8cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
Shoulder tote - a lunch bag you can just grab and go. Made with classic intrecciato weaving, embodying Bottega's artisan spirit. The entire body is crafted from top-tier Happa lambskin, very soft, lightweight, and the small shape is cute and exquisite. The interior capacity is also sufficient; it can be carried by hand or under the arm, quite practical! The bottom features a gold metal base to prevent wear. The details are really spot on! The elegant commuter bag for early risers is the one to choose. 3002 Dimensions: 22x13x9.5

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New classic Loop redesign, oversized ring clasp allows bag to fold or be used as a handle. Crossbody or shoulder strap, detachable to carry as a handbag. Versatile, effortless and composed, lazy yet elegant, creating a subtle sense of luxury.
 Model No. 3003 Dimensions 19X12X9cm

items.name_cn:
Bottega Veneta 2025 New Arrival
PINACOTECA bag, iconic weaving craftsmanship, crafted with 10mm Intrecciato technique, featuring suede lining. Four leather strips add personality and stability. Relaxed and refined, reversible design, shoulder carry or hand carry.
Four ties can be adjusted into different shapes, dual-use for versatile switching, easily blending into your daily rhythm.
Model No.: 817166
Dimensions: 43*23*17.5cm

specs.rawTitle:
Bottega Veneta 2025 New Arrival
PINACOTECA bag, iconic weaving craftsmanship, crafted with 10mm Intrecciato technique, featuring suede lining. Four leather strips add personality and stability. Relaxed and refined, reversible design, shoulder carry or hand carry.
Four ties can be adjusted into different shapes, dual-use for versatile switching, easily blending into your daily rhythm.
Model No.: 817166
Dimensions: 43*23*17.5cm

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA 2025 New Arrival pinacoteca features ultra-soft leather, weaving functionality, practicality, and a relaxed chic vibe❤️‍🔥 Highly recommended for daily essentials. The size perfectly meets the commuting needs of city women—smartphone, keys, lipstick, compact powder, sunscreen, shopping bags... it fits it all!!!🔥 The capacity is impressive~ Suitable for everyone, any outfit, and any occasion. The elegant curved silhouette, exquisite woven texture, refined stitching, and rounded handles make this woven basket bag truly 'stylish yet practical, chic yet effortless'~ Any fashion lovers interested?

items.name_cn:
Bottega Veneta 2024 Fall New Handbag
New arrivals from the 2024 Early Autumn collection. The newly launched Let's Go and Kit bags share a similar charm, both featuring a slim, crisp baguette shape. They are sculpted with a three-dimensional structure using Intrecciato woven leather craftsmanship, reimagining classic elements with creative contours. The bag names also have a casual, effortless feel. Let's Go can be worn as a shoulder bag or handbag, with magnets on both sides allowing you to freely adjust the shape from rectangular to trapezoidal for a unique and fun bag.
Style: 796258
Size: 37*13*11.5cm

items.name_en: BV patti bag Full and three-dimensional padded leather strip, understated luxury is often hidden in details and craftsmanship. This bag has a casual opening, simple and elegant overall design, and comes with a detachable shoulder strap for crossbody or handheld wear to match different outfits. The interior features double-layering and a zippered pocket for secure storage of private items. Whether for capacity, style, or privacy, it offers a full sense of security.
